_notes.file: Physical and procedural mechanics tables for stars, worlds, moons, rings, and generated body sites.
_notes.editing: Use compact labels that can combine cleanly in body summaries. Environment-policy code may override incompatible rolls, so add new options with clear physical meaning.

sections.activityLabels: Star activity labels by modified roll; null max means the open-ended highest band after code conversion.
sections.atmosphereTable: Base atmosphere roll table before world-class compatibility repairs.
sections.hydrosphereTable: Base volatile and surface-liquid roll table before compatibility repairs.
sections.geologyTable: Base geology and interior-activity roll table.
sections.climateSourceTable: Climate tags used as source material before thermal-zone filtering.
sections.radiationTable: Radiation severity for body detail generation.
sections.ringTypeTable: Ring descriptors for bodies that receive ring systems.
sections.extremeHotAtmospheres: Atmospheres allowed for furnace and inferno terrestrial bodies.
sections.extremeHotVolatiles: Hydrosphere states allowed for furnace and inferno terrestrial bodies.
sections.envelopeGeologies: Geology labels for gas giants, ice giants, and sub-Neptune envelope worlds.
sections.extremeHotClimateTags: Climate tags compatible with furnace and inferno rocky bodies.
sections.hotClimateTags: Climate tags compatible with hot inner worlds.
sections.temperateClimateTags: Climate tags compatible with temperate-zone worlds.
sections.coldClimateTags: Climate tags compatible with cold outer worlds.
sections.extremeHotEnvelopeClimateTags: Climate tags compatible with close-in envelope worlds.
sections.envelopeClimateTags: Climate tags compatible with normal envelope worlds.
sections.biospheres: Biosphere status labels; keep non-sapient unless the setting premise changes.
sections.bodySites: Hook-style site prompts for bodies without a full settlement, keyed by body-category group plus a universal 'any' pool. Each entry should imply an unanswered question, conflict, or mystery in its phrasing.

atmosphereTable.value: Thin but usable with pressure gear

hydrosphereTable.value: Exotic solvent or GU-stabilized fluid chemistry

any: Free-captain hideout that pays its dues to whichever fleet asked last
Salvage cutting platform working a hull the registry says was scrapped a decade ago
Gardener-warning beacon broadcasting in a code the local port can't decrypt
First-wave landing dome with the original crew never accounted for in any registry
Stripped freighter hulk that someone has been re-pressurizing one deck at a time
Smuggler's freight cache buried on a seventeen-year reclaim cycle
Disputed mineral claim where the assay results changed between filing and survey
Memorial name array still adding entries from a casualty list nobody published
Pinchdrive misjump scar with one hull half-emerged from the geometry
Pilgrimage beacon chain whose third stop was quietly rerouted last season
Drone patrol waypoint overflying an empty cargo hauler nine days into a five-day route
Bonded cargo cache whose lock count went from three to two without paperwork
Customs hold marker watching a freighter that has been awaiting clearance for a year
Sealed evidence cache on a chain-of-custody that lost two signatures in the relay
Sensor picket that swept clean last week and now reads three return signatures
Salvage-lien marker on a hulk three creditors all claim and none will board
Ration transfer point that hasn't seen a relief shipment since the route changed
Equipment repair bay running a contract the parent company says it never issued
Field medical station with a triage log nobody has updated in eleven days
Survey crew outpost whose last entries are filed in a hand the supervisor doesn't recognize
Refugee transit berth that processed a manifest twice and never deplaned half of it
Civic power relay drawing forty percent over its registered industrial customer base
Wake-shear marker drifting parallel to a route nobody on file has used in three years
Black-budget shipping cradle accepting deliveries that come in unmarked and leave with seals
Witness shelter whose roster is sealed by a court that hasn't sat in eleven months
Disaster telemetry loop replaying one minute the official record skips
Crew contract registry where the same five names rotate through twenty different ship rolls
terrestrial: Buried first-wave ruin still answering a call sign on the old emergency band
Failed terraforming scar where the engineered weather still runs a forty-day cycle
Lava-tube colony whose air recyclers run cleaner than the registered surface plant
Quarantine safehold sealed against an outbreak the official record never named
Borehole habitat whose deepest level is locked off and still drawing reactor heat
Cryosleep facility that woke one passenger early and never logged who
Strikebreaker barracks ruin with a generator nobody has admitted to refueling
Worker shelter cluster wired to a power source the grid map doesn't show
Chiral mining claim worked by a crew that hasn't been heard from in six months
Old bombardment shelter city now logging clinic intake the public ledger doesn't carry
Submarine habitat bracing against tides that don't match any catalogued moon
Quarantine cemetery cylinder still receiving deposits the public registry doesn't list
Failed garden dome breached on the inside and welded shut from the outside
Aerostat city drifting two hundred kilometers off its filed station-keeping line
Terminator-rail city whose midnight train follows a schedule the public board doesn't carry
Glassed mineral plain where every sample comes back wearing the same isotope signature
Plume-vent lab whose intake schedule is set to plumes the published model says are dormant
Dome cluster with one dome at lockdown pressure and no incident filed
Polar borehole community evacuated on paper, still running scheduled supply drops
Continental highway anchorage where the contract crew rotated twice without leaving
Atmosphere scrubber ring whose filter stack is loaded with a chirality the planet shouldn't produce
envelope: Cloud-skimmer rig overdue on its check-in and still drawing power from the grid
Magnetosphere listening post tuned to a frequency the operators won't name on the duty log
Aerostat refinery whose night-shift chiral yields beat the day shift's by two grades
Atmospheric deep-probe still transmitting from a depth that should have crushed it
Radiation-belt salvage cradle pulling apart a hull marked lost in a different system
Helium tap rig running an unauthorized siphon the registered owner won't acknowledge
Storm-eye survey platform holding station against winds the model says are impossible
Auroral-arc beacon chain repeating a warning string nobody at the local port can parse
Hydrogen-envelope mining drift returning with one extra empty container every cycle
Cloud-deck monastery whose roster grew the week a downstream warning beacon woke up
Ring-anchor refueling station whose registered owner died nine months ago in another orbit
Magnetosphere-driven generator field whose output curve doesn't match its input
Volatile capture net pulling thirty percent above its filed quota for two cycles running
Atmosphere scrubber ring whose maintenance crew lives on a freighter that never docks
minor: Hollowed asteroid where one access lock still answers to a captain's voiceprint
Comet-stream chaser fleet that breaks contact every perihelion and rejoins short a ship
Trojan swarm hideout the patrol files say is empty and the patrol won't cross
Ore-grading station whose rejected cargo always sells on a different freeport
Ice-hauling depot whose meltwater assay flagged something nobody followed up on
Dwarf-planet anchor field anchoring three more lines than its filed manifest
Belt-seam survey rig drifting on a vector its station-keepers never authorized
Volatile probe field with one frozen drone broadcasting an obsolete fleet code
Captured-asteroid prison whose roster runs shorter than its life-support draws would suggest
Free-floating dwarf with a single outpost lit by a power signature the grid doesn't claim
Comet-reservoir survey beacon that flashed once last year and resumed standard ping
Scattered-disk waystation taking deliveries from no filed flight plan
Belt salvage flotilla where each ship's manifest balances and the fleet's doesn't
Asteroid hollow with a fresh weld seam over what the schematic calls solid rock
Mining moonlet whose registered yield has been flat for two years on rising power draws
Comet-ice depot whose volatile assay returns one chiral handedness on alternating shifts
anomaly: Containment pylon ring whose innermost pylon is silent and the others won't say why
Bleed-survey cradle holding station inside a shear band the math says is migrating
Black-lab platform broadcasting a standard registration over a hull no shipyard built
Interdiction buoy net with one buoy missing and three claiming to be it
Failed gate-scar marker still emitting a wake decay nobody has carbon-dated
Programmable-matter quarantine whose perimeter is half a meter further out each week
Metric mirage zone with three certified survey buoys returning three legal positions
Observerse-fracture watch station crewed on six-hour rotations no one volunteers for twice
Dark-sector anchor field weighing fourteen percent over its filed mass with the audit overdue
Gardener-shadowed exclusion picket whose patrol ring shifted inward the morning after a storm
Chiral dust shoal that re-tests as a different handedness when you change instruments
Wake-decay rig recording a gate signature for a gate the records say was scrapped
rogueCaptured: Hidden habitat whose registered owner does not match the lights still burning
Black-budget research dome that left no orbital intercept signature on approach
Refueling cradle for ships that file no inbound flight plan and leave no outbound
Exile community whose census jumps each time a freighter loses a stevedore
Surface beacon broadcasting a colony charter older than the local government
Ice-shielded vault the quarantine authority can't approach and won't explain
Drift-line of frozen probes from three surveys, each survey refused payment
Captured-rogue settlement whose buried records pre-date the registered first wave
Smuggler ice depot whose offloads always coincide with a different system's customs blackout
Hidden archive habitat whose climate logs read like a far older world's records
